stories.title: Top moments and more from the third round
stories.summary: Here are the best sights and sounds from Saturday's action at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Semenyo wins FA Cup for treble-chasing Man City
stories.summary: Manchester City kept alive their hopes of winning a domestic treble as Antoine Semenyo's sensational second-half finish broke Chelsea's resolve to settle the FA Cup final 1-0 at Wembley.

stories.title: Chargers OC McDaniel in NFL accelerator program
stories.summary: The NFL's revamped accelerator program features several notable head coaching and general manager candidates -- and even a head coach from 2025 in Mike McDaniel.

stories.title: Spurs oust Wolves in rout, set up clash with OKC
stories.summary: Stephon Castle, De'Aaron Fox and Dylan Harper accounted for nearly half of the Spurs' scoring in a series-clinching 139-109 win over the Timberwolves to set up a Western Conference finals clash with the Thunder.

stories.title: Clark proud of 3-point breakthrough in OT loss
stories.summary: Fever star Caitlin Clark took three quarters to find her groove before carrying Indiana into overtime with a score-tying triple with 3.1 seconds left in regulation.
